message:
test(rch): Expand proptest coverage and add selection algorithm tests

**rch-common/src/proptest_tests.rs (+495 lines):**
- Additional property-based tests for config parsing
- Edge case coverage for worker IDs and patterns

**rch/src/main.rs (+279 lines):**
- Unit tests for CLI argument parsing
- Command dispatch verification

**rchd/src/selection.rs (+516 lines):**
- Worker selection algorithm tests
- Load balancing strategy verification
- Priority and affinity scoring tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
